name: @stackra/settings
purpose: Unified settings framework — registry-based with @Setting/@Field/@Group decorators, sync-cache + async-hydrate, realtime broadcast, and HeroUI admin UI.
capabilities: HeroUI-driven admin UI (list, edit, group, section)
when_to_use: Rendering a per-tenant / per-user settings admin surface with typed fields and dual persistence.
when_not_to_use: For build-time env config use @stackra/config; for compile-time feature flags use @stackra/decorators.
